LIVE SESSION · MUKUNDAPUR
— Our Story

Where Technology
Meets Tomorrow

Founded in 2012 by Sudip Podder, S.P. Computer Center has evolved into Mukundapur's most trusted digital learning hub — blending hands-on training with modern curriculum to equip students for a tech-driven world.

— What We Teach

Our Courses

01
🖥️
Pre Basic
The perfect starting point for absolute beginners entering the digital world.
  • Turn On/Off & Log On/Off procedures
  • Basic knowledge of all computer parts
  • Input, Processing & Output functions
  • Types of Memory Devices
  • Tux Paint & Microsoft Office Basics
  • Beginning Typing Test Practice
02
📊
Basic
Build a strong professional foundation in Microsoft Office and Internet skills.
  • MS Word, Excel (Advance), PowerPoint
  • MS Publisher & HTML Basics
  • Bengali Typing (Bangla Word & Avro)
  • Speed Typing with Typing Master
  • Internet, Email, Download & Upload
  • Operating System & LAN
03
🎨
Graphics
Master professional design tools for a creative and digital career.
  • Adobe Photoshop (CS Version)
  • CorelDRAW (Upper X Version)
  • Logo Creation & Marketing Graphics
  • Page Maker 0.7 & Modern DTP Works
  • 3D Works by 3DHAD
  • Graphical Project Presentation
04
📐
AutoCAD
Professional building drawing & architectural design — newly added.
  • 2D Drafting & Annotation
  • Building Layout & Floor Plans
  • Architectural Drawing Techniques
  • CAD File Management & Printing
05
📒
Tally ERP 9
Complete accounting & financial management — newly added.
  • Accounting Fundamentals & Ledgers
  • GST Filing & Invoicing
  • Payroll & Inventory Management
  • Banking & Tax Management
06
🔧
Hardware & Software
Hands-on technical training for real-world computer servicing.
  • Computer Assembly & Connection Setup
  • Windows Formatting & Installation
  • Software Installing & Uninstalling
  • Desktop Assembling & Error Fixing

— Testimonials

What Our Students Say

"
Sudip sir is an exceptional teacher. I joined with zero computer knowledge and within 3 months I could handle MS Office, email, and basic design work. The personal attention given to each student is remarkable.
★★★★★
Priya Chakraborty
Basic Computer · 2023
"
My son became the top scorer in his school's IT competition after just two months here. The environment is encouraging and very professional. Absolutely the best centre in Mukundapur.
★★★★★
Mita Das
Parent · 2023
"
Learned AutoCAD building drawing from scratch here. Very well structured course. I now work as a junior draftsman at a construction firm. Forever grateful to sir for this career change.
★★★★★

AutoCAD · 2024

The Graphics course is incredible value. I now freelance on DTP projects and logo design. Sudip sir's knowledge of Photoshop and CorelDraw is unmatched. Best investment I've made in my career.

Had my computer assembled and serviced here — fast, affordable, and honest. They didn't charge for unnecessary parts. This is the only place I trust for all my computer needs in Mukundapur.
